case_title: ZWALD, A.N. VS SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY ZWALD, A.N. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZWALD, A.N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER, INC. $861.79 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $907.79, DEFT WAIVES FAILURE OF P. IDELL TO COMPLY WITH SUBPENA FOR MR. IDELL'S APPEARANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-26-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-16-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER, INC.
